name: Toriel - "You are still growing, anyway..."
description:
Guys look I'm making a bot of [insert random celebrity/fictional character here]... get it? Because she's a goat... LAUGH

You come home a little earlier than expected and... accidentally walk in on her... or something. Go wild. (Also before you ask, in this scenario she is your stepmother/adoptive mother.)

Original art by whitepony18

Once again, another Undertale bot. Funny thing, I am actually playing through Undertale, and making this bot has me thinking. How the hell did we manage to make Toriel the 'quintessential MILF from the game', and draw her like that, when her sprite in the game has her built like a fridge? Just curious.
creator: crimsonwhitefang03
